flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Aaniiih Nakoda College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $3.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Aaniiih Nakoda College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $3.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Aaniiih Nakoda College rose 94% between 2018 and 2021 (34.3% → 66.7%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Aaniiih Nakoda College are 53% above 6-year earnings ($20.0k → $30.5k).
